# Browser Use — Full Documentation

> AI-powered browser automation. Run tasks with natural language, get structured data back.

**Recommended: Use the BU Agent API (v3) for new projects.** V3 provides more accurate agents, long-running tasks, file uploads, and persistent workspaces. V3 is a superset of v2. Import from `browser_use_sdk.v3` (Python) or `browser-use-sdk/v3` (TypeScript).

Browser Use has two products. The full documentation for each is available at:

- **Browser Use Cloud**: [/cloud/llms-full.txt](https://docs.browser-use.com/cloud/llms-full.txt) — Complete cloud SDK and API reference with all pages.
- **Browser Use Open Source**: [/open-source/llms-full.txt](https://docs.browser-use.com/open-source/llms-full.txt) — Complete open-source library reference with all pages.

For concise page indexes:
- [/cloud/llms.txt](https://docs.browser-use.com/cloud/llms.txt) — Cloud documentation index.
- [/open-source/llms.txt](https://docs.browser-use.com/open-source/llms.txt) — Open-source documentation index.

For the SDK quick-start reference (designed for AI coding agents):
- [Coding Agent Quickstart](https://docs.browser-use.com/cloud/coding-agent-quickstart) — Every SDK method, parameter, and response type in one page.
